metadata.guardrail: AI copy is generated from validated metrics and does not modify numeric source data.

hero.headline: Closed-won revenue is ahead of goal by $1,250,000
hero.body: The latest CRM refresh shows $3,250,000 in closed-won sales against a $2,000,000 goal — 162.5% of target, putting the team $1,250,000 ahead of plan.

cards.title: Exceeding goal by 62.5%
cards.body: Closed-won sales of $3,250,000 surpass the $2,000,000 goal by $1,250,000, reaching 162.5% attainment across 3 closed-won opportunities.

cards.title: Strong open pipeline
cards.body: 12 total opportunities carry $8,780,000 in pipeline value, with $6,152,500 weighted and $4,840,000 still open and active.

cards.title: West leads all regions
cards.body: The West region tops the leaderboard at $4,410,000 across 4 opportunities, representing the largest regional concentration in this refresh.

cards.title: Follow-up queue
cards.body: 2 open opportunities have not been updated in 21 or more days and remain visible for review.
